nodes.title: Inspector Report LOW
widgets_values:
⬡ Polyhedron LoRA Inspector
  (no lora_info — connect uls_config_out from Stack v119+)

Polyhedron LoRA Stack - lean demo (WanVideoWrapper)

1. Pick your WAN 2.2 HIGH/LOW models in the two WanVideo loaders.
2. Add LoRAs in the two Stacks - the Bridge nodes carry the
   patched model back into the wrapper.
3. Empty Embeds (1 frame) + Frame Inflate = clean single-image
   output (works around kijai #1827).
4. Attention is set to sdpa - switch to sageattn if installed.

Requires: ComfyUI-WanVideoWrapper, ComfyUI-KJNodes,
ComfyUI-Custom-Scripts.

⚠ WAN T2I + LoRA + fp8 = LoRA bug (kijai #1827)

When generating single frames (num_frames=1) with active
LoRAs on fp8_scaled models, LoRA effects often don't apply
— output looks like the base model.

Fixes:
  • Load model as GGUF Q6_K instead of fp8_scaled (recommended)
  • Use ⬡ Polyhedron Wan Frame Inflate (below)
  • Switch to native KSampler + UNETLoader
